page_content:
HONR318 Advanced Honors Seminar (3 Credits)

A series of seminars, often interdisciplinary in character, and sometimes team taught. The subjects will vary from semester to semester. Restriction: Permission of University Honors Program.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
